title: product_rules
description: Stage-ordered math.js expressions that compute derived values and line-item quantities. Stages execute in order: 'derive' (secondary values from inputs) → 'stock' (stock-length requirements) → 'accessory' (bracket/cap/screw counts) → 'component' (final emitted components). Variables from earlier stages are available to later stages; not vice versa.

name.description: Short identifier for traces and logs.

expression.description: math.js expression. Example: 'floor((target_height_mm + slat_gap_mm - 3) / (slat_size_mm + slat_gap_mm))'. Available functions include floor/ceil/round/max/min. Cross-stage variables must be defined earlier in pipeline.

output_key.description: Variable name to bind the result to. Usually identical to 'name'. Downstream rules can reference this key.

priority.description: Ordering within a stage — lower runs first. Use 10-spaced values (10,20,30,…) so new rules can slot between without renumbering.
